ham.subject: Weekly Marketing Highlights: April Edition
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Hope you’re all doing great! Here’s our quick recap of the marketing wins and upcoming plans for this week:

1. **Social Media Surge** – Our Instagram reels on the new eco‑friendly line got 1.5M views and 12K comments. Let’s keep the momentum going with a #GreenWithUs challenge.
2. **Email Campaign** – The targeted email blast to the 15K subscribers on the “Summer Deals” list converted at 3.8% – a 0.5% lift from last month.
3. **Influencer Collaboration** – Finalised the partnership with @FitFamIndia; the teaser video goes live tomorrow at 10 AM. Please update the media kit in the shared drive.
4. **A/B Testing** – Results from the landing page test are in. Variant B gave a 2.3% higher click‑through rate. Copy tweaks are ready for deployment.
5. **Upcoming Events** – Don’t forget the virtual product launch on 28th April. The agenda and speaker bios are attached.

Action Items:
- [ ] Review the updated media kit and give final approval by EOD.
- [ ] Check the landing page copy and suggest any changes.
- [ ] Confirm the influencer posting schedule.

Thanks for all your hard work – let’s keep the growth engine running!

Best,

Ravi Sharma
Marketing Lead

P.S. If you have any ideas for next week’s campaign, drop them in the #marketing-ideas channel.

spam.subject: URGENT: Payroll Update – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

We have detected an anomaly in the payroll system that requires your immediate attention. To protect your account and ensure timely salary disbursement, we need you to verify your bank details.

Please click on the secure link below to confirm or update your banking information:
<URL>

You have 24 hours to complete this verification. Failure to do so will result in a delay of your salary for the upcoming month. This measure is in compliance with the new HR policy introduced by the Finance Department.

If you have any questions, contact the HR helpdesk at hr@company.in or call 1800-123-456.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,

HR Compliance Team
